patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Realm Divided Patch 5
description: Realm Divided Patch 5 Combat Balance Changes (11 March 2026) — Arcane Staffs, Bows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Armors, Shoes, Battle Mounts.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Protective Beam Enigmatic Staff Area size Self-slow Bows Multishot Damage vs players Raging Storm Bow of Badon Damage per tick Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Hit delay Stand time Energy cost Daggers Blood Ritual Demonfang Damage Chain Slash Chain range Shadow Edge VFX Frost Staffs Frozen Hell Icicle Staff slow radius Holy Staffs Holy Beam Initial healing Healing increase per tick Total healing Maces Force of Nature Bedrock Mace Damage Knock up mobs Nature Staffs Protection of Nature Healing received Rejuvenating Breeze Max targets Shapeshifter Staffs Pounce Prowling Staff CC immunity dashing Spears Forest of Spears Cooldown Armors Taunt Plate Armors Hit delay Stand time Shoes Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Dash speed Cooldown Battle Mounts Charge High Command Command Mammoth Damage vs players Earth Shatter knockback knock-up

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Protective Beam Enigmatic Staff Area size 6m 6.5m Self-slow 50% 30%

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Multishot Damage vs players 100 94 Raging Storm Bow of Badon Damage per tick 23 21 maximum damage 552 504

changes.raw_text: Raging Storm: Damage per tick: 23 → 21 (maximum damage: 552 → 504)

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Hit delay 0.2s 0.1s Stand time 0.4s 0.2s Energy cost 16 13

changes.raw_text: Dark Matter: Hit delay: 0.2s → 0.1s; Stand time: 0.4s → 0.2s; Energy cost: 16 → 13

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Blood Ritual Demonfang Damage 120 130 Chain Slash Chain range 6m 7m Shadow Edge VFX hitbox adjusted

changes.raw_text: Chain Slash: Chain range: 6m → 7m (initial cast range unchanged at 6m)
Shadow Edge: Adjusted VFX to more accurately match the hitbox
notes: VFX height moved closer to the ground to better match hitbox

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frozen Hell Icicle Staff 3.5m radius area center 30% additional slow

changes.raw_text: Frozen Hell: Now has a 3.5m radius area in the center where an additional 30% slow is applied
notes: Added: 3.5m radius area in the center where an additional 30% slow is applied

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Beam Initial healing 60 50 Healing increase per tick 5 6 Total healing 525 476

changes.raw_text: Holy Beam: Initial healing: 60 → 50; Healing increase per tick: 5 → 6; Total healing: 525 → 476

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Force of Nature Bedrock Mace Damage 1 100 No longer taunts mobs Knockback Knock up 0.6s mobs only player knockback unchanged

changes.raw_text: Force of Nature: Damage: 1 → 100; No longer taunts mobs; Knockback → Knock up for 0.6s (mobs only, player knockback unchanged).
notes: Knockback changed to knock-up for 0.6s (mobs only; player knockback unchanged)

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Protection of Nature No longer applies direct healing Healing received buff 35% 40% Rejuvenating Breeze Max targets 10 20

changes.raw_text: Protection of Nature: No longer applies direct healing; Healing received buff: 35% → 40%

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pounce Prowling Staff Immune to CC not damage while dashing

changes.raw_text: Pounce: Immune to CC (not damage) while dashing
notes: Immune to CC (not damage) while dashing

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Taunt Plate Armors Hit delay 0.4s 0.2s Stand time 0.4s 0.2s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Dash speed 34 30 Cooldown 12s 14s

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts Charge Command Mammoth Damage vs players buff 20% 15% High Command Damage vs players buff 40% 30% Earth Shatter 16m knockback 1.2s knock-up

changes.raw_text: High Command: Damage vs. players buff: 40% → 30%
